team_name: AI-Powered Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis Platform for Government Procurement
summary: Design an AI platform to automate tender understanding, bidder analysis, and eligibility evaluation in government procurement while ensuring explainability, consistency, and auditability.
key_steps: Automatic parsing of tender documents using NLP/LLMs
Extraction of tender criteria and bidder data
Application of deterministic rule evaluation for consistency
Flagging ambiguous or low-confidence cases for human review
optimization_claims: Reduce evaluation time from days to minutes
